description: Spring Boot app designed to validate Java call graph operation via Log4Shell (REACHABLE) and Text4Shell in dead code (NOT_REACHABLE)
_canary_purpose: If commons-text CVE-2022-42889 shows UNKNOWN instead of NOT_REACHABLE, the Java call graph is broken or disabled. DeadCodeService has no Spring annotations and is never instantiated.

CVE-2021-44228.note: User-controlled input flows directly into log4j. Spring @PostMapping is an entrypoint.
CVE-2021-44228.failure_symptom: NOT_REACHABLE or UNKNOWN means Java call graph is not recognising Spring @PostMapping as entrypoints

CVE-2022-42889.call_path: NONE — DeadCodeService has no @Service/@Component, is never instantiated
CVE-2022-42889.failure_symptom: UNKNOWN result means Java call graph did not run or failed to identify dead classes

call_graph.dead_code_reason: DeadCodeService has no @Service, @Component, or @Bean annotation and is not referenced by any Spring-managed class

validation_rules.description: commons-text must be NOT_REACHABLE (DeadCodeService never instantiated)
validation_rules.fail: CVE-2022-42889 shows UNKNOWN — Java call graph did not run
CVE-2021-44228 shows NOT_REACHABLE or UNKNOWN — Spring entrypoints not recognised
